reason: Slice 4 frontend booking flow tests are missing. The plan (lines 193-196, 200) explicitly requires: (1) BookingForm shows error for 409 conflict and 400 validation errors, (2) BookingForm shows confirmation after successful booking, (3) BookingForm renders fields when authenticated, (4) form validation with required fields. BookingFlow.test.tsx only has 1 test for ConfirmationCard in isolation. Also, BookingForm was not extracted from App.tsx into a separate component (plan line 110), which blocks proper testing of the booking form flow. All deterministic quality gates pass (backend build/test/format, frontend build/typecheck/lint/format:check/deadcode, 23/23 existing frontend tests, 34/34 backend tests).
